finding: Spatial-LT registration initially failed because OXE config/mixture/transform still only exposed Core-LT; fixed and dry-run passed with 152 episodes.
Dataset-aware manifest counts and manifest-sourced negative instructions are required; Core-LT hardcoded task counts and object_swap negatives are invalid for Spatial-LT.
Naive full-run RBTAD and TCAD-only underperform baseline on Spatial-LT; relation-only shifts make after-grasp counterfactuals noisy.
Full task-balanced and tempered replay damage broad spatial competence; replay branch rejected for this protocol.
Baseline-anchored TCAD-only correction reaches only 0.18 on 10-trial Spatial-LT; standalone TCAD is not sufficient.
RSDF vision+LLM alpha=0.5 reaches 0.31 in 10-trial screening, suggesting relation correction is useful when projector drift is avoided.
Matched 30-trial confirmation: baseline 0.19 vs RSDF vision+LLM 0.25, an absolute +0.06 gain under the same Spatial-LT protocol.
Updated and compiled the manuscript with Spatial-LT RSDF matched 30-trial results; tracked PDF now contains baseline 19.0% and RSDF 25.0%.
